text: One can get to Autonomous University of Madrid by navigating through the streets of Madrid. The university is located in the Cantabrian capital, which is a city rich in history and culture. The university itself, however, is relatively young compared to many other institutions in the country. It was established in 1968, which means it has a relatively short history but has quickly become a prominent educational establishment.
